subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto those who have believed in God and have held fast unto His mighty and impregnable cord, that they may render thanks unto their Creator [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للذین آمنوا بالله و تمسکوا بحبله المحکم المتین لیشکروا بارئهم بما
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @predictions and prophecies, @power of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment
